mapper.select:
/* BatchManageMapper.selectBatchManageInfo */ SELECT APKEY , BATID , BATNM , BATDESCRPT , BATJOBCLASSNM , BATEXECSTADATE , BATEXECENDDATE , CRONEXPSMETH , BATPARAM , ERRSNDCD , BATEXECYN , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM BATCH_MANAGE
AND BATID = #{value}

/* BatchManageMapper.selectBatchManageList */ SELECT APKEY , BATID , BATNM , BATDESCRPT , BATJOBCLASSNM , BATEXECSTADATE , BATEXECENDDATE , CRONEXPSMETH , BATPARAM , ERRSNDCD , BATEXECYN , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM BATCH_MANAGE
mapper.insert: /* BatchManageMapper.insertBatchExeLog */ INSERT INTO BATCH_LOG ( SEQ, APKEY, BATEXECID, BATID, ERRYN, BATEXECDATE, BATEXECLOG, BATERRLOG, BATCLOSDATE, TARGETCNT, SUCCESSCNT, FAILCNT, INSERTDATE, INSERTURKEY, UPDATEDATE, UPDATEURKEY, PARAM ) VALUES (nextval('batch_log_seq'), (SELECT APKEY FROM BATCH_MANAGE WHERE BATID = #{jobName}), #{jobId}, #{jobName}, #{errYn}, TO_TIMESTAMP(#{startTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS.FF3'), #{message}, #{errLog}, TO_TIMESTAMP(#{endTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS.FF3'), #{targetCnt}, #{successCnt}, #{failCnt}, TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{logUser}, TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{logUser}, #{param} )
